name: postman-flows
description: Workaround for running Postman Flows in CI without Enterprise

scripts.test:newman: mkdir -p tests/results/newman && newman run dev/Postman/collection/my-api.postman_collection.json --environment dev/Postman/environments/environment.ci.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export tests/results/newman/smoke.html
